title: The last statement, execution error, is a false positive?
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ttt(id INT PRIMARY KEY, k INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, name VARCHAR(50));
UPDATE ttt SET k = k + 1 WHERE id = 3;
UPDATE ttt SET id = (SELECT MAX(id) + 1 FROM ttt) WHERE id = 3;
key_bug_features: Execution error on updating primary key with duplicate value
